results.rendered_html:
vevī 2 A. (vevīte)
1 To go.
2 To obtain.
3 To concieveconceive, be pregnant.
4 To pervade.
5 To cast, throw.
6 To eat.
7 To wish, desire.
8 To shine; (seldom used in classical literature).
